mention.text: @cursorsupport billing issue here. support stopped replying and i got charged extra for premium prompts but still can't use them. what do i do?

triage.summary: User reports extra premium-prompt charges and that they can’t use the feature; this requires account-specific billing investigation. Best source: route billing issues to hi@cursor.com.

suggested_response: Public reply: keep brief, don’t request sensitive billing details on X, and route to hi@cursor.com. Ask user to email from the address linked to their account and include the relevant charge/invoice details and description. (Optionally mention checking cursor.com/dashboard → Billing & Invoices to find the charge date/invoice.)
suggested_reply: Please email hi@cursor.com from the email address linked to your Cursor account so the team can review the extra premium prompt charges and verify access. Include the charge/invoice date (and a short description of what you’re seeing when you try to use Premium). You can also check cursor.com/dashboard → Billing & Invoices for the invoice details to reference in your email.

sources.title: Billing and payments
sources.snippet: What if my billing issue isn't covered here? Email hi@cursor.com from the email address linked to your account. Include your account details and a description of the issue.
